title: options-flow output
description: Canonical structured output for the options-flow skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered stream) is described in references/rendering.md.

tier.description: Data fidelity: A=real-time (Options Business), B=15-min delayed (Options Developer), C=free Basic (not supported)

tier_caveats.description: Human-readable caveats when tier < A. Empty array on Tier A.

run_at.description: UTC timestamp when the scan was run

max_prints.description: Cap on prints emitted (default 20 for scanability)

min_volume_to_avg_ratio.description: Minimum vol/30d-avg ratio to qualify as unusual (default 3.0)

expiry_window_days.description: Max days to expiry to include (default 60)

strike_band_pct.description: Strike band as fraction of spot (default 0.10 = ±10%)

prints.description: Top notable prints ranked by unusual activity score, descending

occ_ticker.description: Full Massive OCC ticker, e.g. O:TSLA260718C00310000

kind.description: sweep = multi-exchange ISO print (condition 219); block = single large print above ticker-specific threshold; other = qualifying but neither

premium_total_usd.description: Dollar premium of the qualifying activity: sum(size * price * 100) across contributing trades, or day volume * avg trade price * 100

volume.description: Total contracts traded today on this contract

volume_to_avg_ratio.description: Today's volume divided by 30-day average daily volume. Threshold for 'unusual' is 3.0 by default.

volume_to_oi_ratio.description: Today's volume divided by open interest at session start. >1.0 = volume exceeds existing OI (likely opening new interest). <0.5 = likely closing existing positions.

price_vs_nbbo.description: Where the print landed relative to the NBBO at trade time. above_ask = aggressive buy, below_bid = aggressive sell, at_mid = negotiated

inferred_direction.description: Trader read: call + above_ask = bullish; put + above_ask = bearish; at_mid = neutral. The methodology pages explain why these tags are appropriate at the per-print level even though the take should avoid 'bullish/bearish'.

spot_at_print.description: Underlying spot price at the time of the print

iv_at_print.description: Implied volatility on the contract at the snapshot time (annualized fraction, e.g. 0.62 = 62%)

oi_pre_trade.description: Open interest at session start, before any of today's prints

oi_position_signal.description: Reading of opening vs closing based on volume_to_oi_ratio. opening if vol/OI > 1.0; closing if < 0.5; mixed otherwise.

related_prints.description: Same-strike or same-expiry prints from the past N days, for clustering context. Renders as ↳ continuation lines.

timestamp.description: Sip timestamp of the print (UTC). For day-aggregated prints (Tier B), the end-of-day timestamp.

exchange.description: Massive exchange ID where the print landed. Null for day-aggregated prints.

score.description: Internal ranking score combining vol/avg, vol/OI, and premium. Higher = more unusual.

skipped_tickers.description: Tickers in the watchlist that produced no qualifying prints
